selection_reason: Random forest with enriched features (HOG + Gabor + grid stats) produced the best macro-F1 and accuracy without introducing GPU or paid-infrastructure assumptions. Gabor features improve orientation-specific texture discrimination.
feature_engineering_note: Added 48 features: 16 Gabor-response statistics (4 orientations × 2 frequencies × mean/std) and 32 local-grid stats (4×4 spatial grid × mean/std). Total feature count: HOG 1764 + Gabor 16 + grid 32 = 1812.
next_step: Upgrade from HOG features to a compact transfer-learning model when the repo needs a stronger accuracy ceiling.
